name: Gym Simulator
detailed_description:
Gym Simulator RPG

18+

The first ever Gym Simulator

Extremely realistic FIRST PERSON GYM RPG, immersive first person gym interactions and real-time muscle growth.

Features:

Gameplay:
-REAL TIME MUSCLE GROWTH. Watch your body transform as you train
Talk with hot chicks and try to get laid
-Exercises with dumbbells
-Bench press, peck dec machine, pull machine - train on real gym equiment in first person view
-Sit ups
-Push ups
-Run on thread mill
-Chin up
-Kick the boxing bag
-Dialogues
-NPCs treat you differently as per how rigged you are
-Male showers&locker rooms
-Great Stylized graphics


This is a superior project that starts off in Early Access having an impressive gameplay abilities base.
